title: Query defines the search query on a field

$eq.title: Perform an exact match search on the given value

$text.title: Perform a text search on the given value

$in.title: Perform a search on an array of values

$gt.title: Perform a greater than search on the given value

$gte.title: Perform a greater than equal search on the given value

$lt.title: Perform a less than search on the given value

$lte.title: Perform a less than equal search on the given value

$boost.title: Gives a weight to the field on performing the query
